description: Base capabilities. The Vault FS scope is granted dynamically after the user picks a folder — NOT a static path here (NFR-SEC-003).
//: SECURITY MODEL (TC-SEC-002): start with an EMPTY fs scope. When the user selects a Vault, the Rust `fs_scope` module adds ONLY that directory (recursive) to the allowed scope at runtime and rejects any path that escapes it (OUTSIDE_VAULT). Never widen this to the whole disk. All feature code goes through the fs_scope choke point (CODING-STANDARDS §4).
